2605.18013.title: TinySAM 2: Extreme Memory Compression for Efficient Track Anything Model
2605.18013.paper_summary: Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM 2) serves as a core foundation model in the field of video segmentation. Building upon the original SAM model, it introduces a memory bank mechanism and demonstrates outstanding performance in tasks such as semi-supervised video object segmentation and tracking anything. However, the complex computational characteristics of SAM 2's multi-stage image encoder and memory module have raised the barrier to the model's deployment in practical applications. To address this issue, we propose TinySAM 2, a lightweight video segmentation model that balances performance and efficiency. First, a memory quality management mechanism is introduced to select and retain high-informative historical frames as the memory. In addition, a joint-spatial-temporal token compression is proposed that reduces the memory storage and computational cost. Specifically, average pooling is employed to first compress redundancy tokens in the spatial domain. In the temporal domain, informative tokens are selected across frames in the memory bank based on token-level similarity measurement. Besides, we take RepViT as the lightweight image encoder, which further reduces the model parameters. Extensive experiments on challenging datasets such as DAVIS and SA-V demonstrate that TinySAM 2 achieves 90% of the performance of SAM 2.1, with only 7% memory tokens and 3% training data. This study effectively alleviates the bottlenecks in parameter count, computational load, and deployment costs associated with SAM 2, providing a resource-efficient solution for the widespread application of video segmentation models on devices.
2605.18013.paper_summary_zh: Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM 2) 作為視頻分割領域的核心基礎模型。<lb/>在原始 SAM 模型的基礎上，它引入了一種記憶庫機制，並在半監督視頻物體分割和追踪等任務中展示了卓越的性能。<lb/>然而，SAM 2 的多階段圖像編碼器和記憶模塊的複雜計算特性提高了該模型在實際應用中的部署門檻。<lb/>為了解決這一問題，我們提出了 TinySAM 2，一種輕量級視頻分割模型，平衡性能和效率。<lb/>首先，引入了一種記憶質量管理機制，以選擇和保留高信息量的歷史幀作為記憶。<lb/>此外，提出了一種聯合空間-時間令牌壓縮方法，減少了記憶存儲和計算成本。<lb/>具體而言，首先在空間域中使用平均池化來壓縮冗餘令牌。<lb/>在時間域中，根據令牌級相似性測量，從記憶庫中選擇信息豐富的令牌。<lb/>此外，我們採用 RepViT 作為輕量級圖像編碼器，進一步減少模型參數。<lb/>在 DAVIS 和 SA-V 等具有挑戰性的數據集上進行的廣泛實驗表明，TinySAM 2 實現了 SAM 2.1 的 90% 性能，僅使用 7% 的記憶令牌和 3% 的訓練數據。<lb/>本研究有效緩解了與 SAM 2 相關的參數數量、計算負載和部署成本的瓶頸，為視頻分割模型在設備上的廣泛應用提供了一種資源高效的解決方案。
2605.18013.author: Zhaoyuan Ding et.al.
2605.18013.authors: Zhaoyuan Ding, Yijing Yang, Han Shu, Xinghao Chen
